title: Paper Straws,100 Pcs Premium Quality Paper Drinking Straw for Wedding Party Restaurant Juice, Coffee Cold Drinks, Dessert and DIY Decoration Colorful Bendy Disposable Straws
features: Biodegradable Disposable Paper Straws: Colored disposable drinking paper straws are made of degradable food contact grade pulp, which is degradable after use, environmentally safe, hygienic and odorless.

Wide Range Of Uses: high temperature resistant and environmentally friendly paper straws are very suitable for daily drinking, such as juice drinks, milk, coffee, etc. At the same time can also be used as handmade, cake petites decoration, etc. Add colorful good mood to your birthday party, wedding party, house party. Our striped colored drinking paper straws are the best decoration to celebrate any event occasion
High-Quality Packaging: Double-layer packaging, tight packaging, not easy to enter dust, colored paper straws are made of multi-layer thick paper, not easy to break, use with confidence

Coreint has always been committed to providing customers with higher quality products and a comfortable customer experience.
